/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/hexedit_tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit_tests.dir/src/file_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit_tests.dir/src/file_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit_tests.dir/src/editor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit_tests.dir/src/undo_history.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit_tests.dir/src/search.cpp.o -o hexedit_tests
